# Scale Forge

> Scale Forge is a premium web design, development, and SEO agency building high-converting websites for businesses around the globe.

## Services Offered
- Custom Web Design and Development (Next.js, Tailwind CSS)
- Technical and Content SEO Optimization
- Content Creation and Marketing Strategy
- Digital Product Architecture and Branding

## Technical Stack
This website is built with:
- Next.js 15 (React 19, App Router)
- Tailwind CSS & Framer Motion
- Sanity.io (Headless CMS)
- Supabase (Backend/Database)
- Hosted on Vercel

## Key Pages
- About: https://scaleforgewebdev.vercel.app/about
- Services: https://scaleforgewebdev.vercel.app/services
- Projects: https://scaleforgewebdev.vercel.app/projects
- Pricing: https://scaleforgewebdev.vercel.app/pricing
- Contact: https://scaleforgewebdev.vercel.app/contact

## Contact Information
For inquiries, reach out via our contact page.
Location: Pakistan. Serving clients globally.
